description_long: This is a large, gray, swept-wing military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose. The wings are long and slender, featuring a slight anhedral angle and red star insignias near the tips, indicating a likely military origin. The tail section is equipped with a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming a classic tail design. The engines are mounted in pairs under the wings, and the landing gear is visible, with two main gear units and a nose gear. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, with a multi-panel canopy. The overall surface is smooth and metallic, with minimal visible markings aside from the insignias.
description: A large, gray, swept-wing military jet airplane with red star insignias, underwing engines, and a conventional tail. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a forward-mounted cockpit and visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, slender fuselage, swept wings with red star insignias, underwing engines, and the pointed nose.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, anhedral wing angle, and the symmetrical placement of engines and landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail section, underwing engines, and the overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide wingspan with visible landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with a slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four jet engines mounted in pairs under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel canopy.
